metadata.description: HEIC/HEIF to JPEG conversion for Node.js consumers

commands: test -f ../../../apps/api/src/graphql/generated/schema.graphql || (echo "Schema file not found at apps/api/src/graphql/generated/schema.graphql. Run 'npm run gen:gql:api' first, or ensure contracts:gen-enums depends on api:gen-gql in project.json (it does, but nx may have silently skipped it)." && exit 1)

metadata.description: End-to-end Playwright tests for the photoapp web client. Runs against a locally-running stack.

commands: test -f ../api/src/graphql/generated/schema.graphql || (echo 'ERROR: Schema file not found at apps/api/src/graphql/generated/schema.graphql. Run npm run gen:gql:api first.' && exit 1)

metadata.scriptContent: nx gen-gql api && nx gen-ioc api
docker build -f infra/docker/Dockerfile --target runtime-node --build-arg APP_NAME=api -t photoapp-api .
docker build -f infra/docker/Dockerfile --target runtime-web --build-arg APP_NAME=web -t photoapp-web .
docker build -f infra/docker/Dockerfile --target runtime-node --build-arg APP_NAME=media-worker -t photoapp-worker .
